title: Coated edge welded bellows to reduce particle emission
abstract: A coated edge welded metal bellows is provided. The coated edge welded metal bellows is generally formed by welding a plurality of convoluted diaphragms together. The coating is deposited using a chemical vapor deposition process such that both sides of the connected diaphragms are coated by a continuous surface coating that also encompasses the welds. The coating is an organic coating, such as, for example, poly para xylylene.
claims: Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A coated, edge welded metal bellows comprising, at least a first annular, convoluted diaphragm with an inside surface, an outside surface, an inside edge portion, and an outside edge portion; at least a second annular, convoluted diaphragm with an inside surface, an outside surface, an inside edge portion, and an outside edge portion that is coupled at a junction to the first annular, convoluted diaphragm, wherein the junction is located on at least one of the inside edge or the outside edge; an organic coating deposited on a majority of the inside surface and the outside surface of both the first annular, convoluted diaphragm and the second annular, convoluted diaphragm wherein the organic coating covers the entire junction and forms a continuous surface from the first annular, convoluted diaphragm to the second annular, convoluted diaphragm. 2. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 1 wherein the organic coating is a poly para xylylene material. 3. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 2 wherein the poly para xylylene is a parylene material. 4. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 3 wherein the parylene material is parylene C. 5. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 1 wherein the organic coating is deposited using a chemical vapor deposition process. 6. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 1 wherein the organic coating is between 19 to 38 microns thick. 7. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 6 wherein the organic coating is about 31 microns thick. 8. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 1 wherein the organic coating is deposited on substantially all of the inside surface and the outside surface of both the first annular, convoluted diaphragm and the second annular, convoluted diaphragm. 9. The coated, edge welded metal bellows of claim 1 comprising a pair of terminal, annular diaphragms having an end configured to couple to a part wherein the organic coating is deposited on substantially all of the inside surface and the outside surface of both the first annular, convoluted diaphragm and the second annular, convoluted diaphragm but not coated on the end configured to couple to the part.
